mapper.sql: b.id, b.bike_code, b.status, b.lng, b.lat, b.area_id, b.create_time, b.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , pa.name AS area_name FROM bike b LEFT JOIN parking_area pa ON b.area_id = pa.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bike (bike_code, status, lng, lat, area_id) VALUES (#{bikeCode}, #{status}, #{lng}, #{lat}, #{areaId})
mapper.update: UPDATE bike SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bike WHERE status = #{status}
